sectors.driver: Tech hit by yields and macro risk
Mixed tape as oil drives rotation

drivers.name: Iran-war uncertainty
drivers.detail: Markets are swinging with every signal about whether the Iran conflict will escalate or head toward talks.

drivers.name: Oil rebound after Monday plunge
drivers.detail: Crude bounced sharply after hopes for talks cooled, putting inflation anxiety back on the tape.

drivers.name: Rate-cut bets pulled back
drivers.detail: Higher oil and inflation fears have nearly erased expectations for a Fed cut this year and even revived hike talk.

drivers.name: Tech under pressure
drivers.detail: The Nasdaq is lagging as higher yields and macro uncertainty keep pressure on growth valuations.

risks.title: Inflation shock persistence
risks.desc: Oil’s rebound threatens to keep inflation hotter and policy more restrictive.

risks.title: One-variable market risk
risks.desc: Stocks are still trading mainly off crude and Iran headlines rather than fundamentals.

risks.title: Cross-asset volatility spike
risks.desc: Yields, crude, and equities are moving abruptly as peace-talk hopes fade in and out.

risks.title: Fragile intraday stabilization
risks.desc: Any apparent calm can reverse quickly if conflict headlines worsen.

timeline.headline: Optimism from Monday’s talk headlines faded as Iran denied direct talks.
Stocks swung as investors reassessed the duration of the conflict.
timeline.effect: Nasdaq weaker while Dow held better.

timeline.headline: Markets remained headline-driven with oil rebounding.

strategies.title: Stay Tactical
strategies.body: Markets are reacting to headlines intraday, making short-term positioning more appropriate than strong directional bets.

strategies.title: Fade Tech Strength
strategies.body: Growth stocks remain vulnerable if yields and oil stay elevated.
strategies.trigger: Nasdaq rallies while yields stay high

strategies.title: Respect Energy Leadership
strategies.body: Energy continues to outperform as long as supply fears persist.

strategies.title: Watch Headline Reversal
strategies.body: Any credible de-escalation could reverse oil and risk positioning quickly.
